\"package edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.Views\\n\\nimport android.content.Context\\nimport android.graphics.Bitmap\\nimport android.graphics.Canvas\\nimport android.graphics.Color\\nimport android.graphics.Paint\\nimport android.graphics.Typeface\\nimport android.util.Log\\nimport android.view.MotionEvent\\nimport android.view.SurfaceHolder\\nimport android.view.SurfaceView\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.AircraftWarApplication\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.R\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.AbstractAircraft\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.BossEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.EliteEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.HeroAircraft\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.MobEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.SuperEliteEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.basic.AbstractFlyingObject\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.bullet.BaseBullet\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.BossEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.EliteEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.MobEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBloodFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBombFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBulletFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBulletPlusFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.SuperEliteEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.observer.BombSubject\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.BaseProp\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBlood\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBomb\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBullet\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBulletPlus\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.utils.ImageManager\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Music.MusicManager\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Setting\\nimport java.util.Random\\nimport java.util.function.Predicate\\n\\n\\n/**\\n * 游戏主视图 - 替代 Swing 的 Game JPanel\\n * 使用 SurfaceView 支持高性能游戏渲染\\n */\\nclass GameView(context: Context) : SurfaceView(context), SurfaceHolder.Callback, Runnable {\\n\\n companion object {\\n private const val TAG = \\\"GameView\\\"\\n\\n // 目标帧率\\n private const val TARGET_FPS = 60\\n private const val FRAME_INTERVAL = 1000L / TARGET_FPS // ~16ms\\n }\\n\\n // 飞行物列表\\n private lateinit var heroAircraft: HeroAircraft\\n private var enemyAircrafts: MutableList<AbstractAircraft> = mutableListOf()\\n private var heroBullets: MutableList<BaseBullet> = mutableListOf()\\n private var enemyBullets: MutableList<BaseBullet> = mutableListOf()\\n private var props: MutableList<BaseProp> = mutableListOf()\\n\\n // 工厂\\n private val mobEnemyFactory = MobEnemyFactory()\\n private val eliteEnemyFactory = EliteEnemyFactory()\\n private val superEliteEnemyFactory = SuperEliteEnemyFactory()\\n private val bossEnemyFactory = BossEnemyFactory()\\n private val propBloodFactory = PropBloodFactory()\\n private val propBombFactory = PropBombFactory()\\n private val propBulletFactory = PropBulletFactory()\\n private val propBulletPlusFactory = PropBulletPlusFactory()\\n\\n\\n /**\\n * 屏幕中出现的敌机最大数量\\n */\\n private var enemyMaxNumber = 5\\n private var bossExistFlag = 0 // 是否已经生成Boss\\n private var bossKillCount = 0 // 已击毁Boss数量\\n private var randomFactory: Random = Random() // 生成随机数\\n\\n /**\\n * 敌机生成概率\\n * 70% 生成普通敌机\\n * 20% 生成精英敌机\\n * 10% 生成超级精英敌机\\n */\\n private val enemyRate = 10\\n\\n /**\\n * 道具生成概率\\n * 30% 生成血量道具\\n * 30% 生成炸弹道具\\n * 30% 生成子弹道具(两种)\\n * 10% 不生成道具\\n */\\n private val propRate = 10\\n\\n // 背景图片\\n private var backgroundBitmapScaled: Bitmap? = null\\n private var backgroundTop: Int = 0\\n\\n // 子弹发射间隔控制\\n private val cycleDuration = 1200\\n private var cycleTime = 0\\n private var timeInterval = 40\\n\\n // Game over标识\\n private var gameOverFlag = false\\n var onGameOver: ((Int) -> Unit)? = null // 游戏结束回调\\n\\n // 分数\\n private var score = 0\\n\\n // 观察者\\n private var bombSubject: BombSubject = BombSubject()\\n\\n // 画笔，用于绘制图像、文字\\n private val paint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG)\\n private val textPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {\\n color = Color.RED\\n textSize = 48f\\n typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD\\n }\\n\\n // SurfaceHolder，控制surface的创建和销毁\\n private val surfaceHolder: SurfaceHolder = holder\\n private var gameThread: Thread? = null\\n private var isRunning = false\\n\\n\\n init {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"GameView created\\\")\\n surfaceHolder.addCallback(this) // 设置SurfaceHolder回调，监听surface创建和销毁\\n isFocusable = true\\n isFocusableInTouchMode = true\\n }\\n\\n private fun initGameObjects() {\\n heroAircraft = HeroAircraft(\\n width / 2,\\n height - ImageManager.heroImage.height,\\n 0, 0, 100\\n )\\n heroAircraft.setShootStrategy(\\\"NORMAL\\\")\\n }\\n\\n // ======================\\n // SurfaceHolder回调，监听surface创建和销毁\\n // ======================\\n\\n override fun surfaceCreated(holder: SurfaceHolder) {\\n assert(AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_HEIGHT == height)\\n assert(AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH == width)\\n\\n when (Setting.getDifficulty()) {\\n \\\"easy\\\" -> {\\n backgroundBitmapScaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(ImageManager.backgroundImageEasy, width, height, false)\\n }\\n \\\"medium\\\" -> {\\n backgroundBitmapScaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(ImageManager.backgroundImageNormal, width, height, false)\\n }\\n \\\"hard\\\" -> {\\n backgroundBitmapScaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(ImageManager.backgroundImageHard, width, height, false)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 初始化游戏对象\\n initGameObjects()\\n isRunning = true\\n startGame()\\n }\\n\\n override fun surfaceChanged(holder: SurfaceHolder, format: Int, width: Int, height: Int) {\\n // 屏幕尺寸变化时重新计算缩放（可选）\\n }\\n\\n override fun surfaceDestroyed(holder: SurfaceHolder) {\\n overGame()\\n }\\n\\n\\n // =======================\\n // 游戏action相关\\n // =======================\\n\\n fun startGame() {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"Game started\\\")\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"当前难度：${Setting.getDifficulty()}\\\")\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"音效开关：${Setting.musicOpen}\\\")\\n MusicManager.switchNormalBgm()\\n gameThread = Thread(this, \\\"GameLoop\\\").apply { start() }\\n }\\n fun pauseGame() {\\n isRunning = false\\n }\\n fun overGame() {\\n isRunning = false\\n gameThread?.join()\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"Game paused\\\")\\n }\\n override fun run() {\\n while (isRunning && !gameOverFlag) {\\n val lastFrameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\\n\\n // 敌机生成、子弹发射频率控制\\n if (timeCountAndNewCycleJudge()) {\\n // Spawn new enemy aircraft\\n if (enemyAircrafts.size < enemyMaxNumber) {\\n val randomNum = randomFactory.nextInt(enemyRate).toInt()\\n\\n // 根据随机数生成普通、精英敌机、超级精英敌机\\n if (randomNum == 0){\\n enemyAircrafts.add(superEliteEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n }else if (randomNum == 1 || randomNum == 2){\\n enemyAircrafts.add(eliteEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n }\\n else{\\n enemyAircrafts.add(mobEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 每300分产生一个Boss, 且场上只能有一个Boss(仅普通模式、困难模式)\\n if (score >= (bossKillCount + 1) * 300 && score != 0 && bossExistFlag == 0\\n && Setting.getDifficulty() != \\\"easy\\\"){\\n MusicManager.switchBossBgm()\\n enemyAircrafts.add(bossEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n bossExistFlag = 1;\\n }\\n\\n // 观察者注册新敌机\\n bombSubject.registerObserver(enemyAircrafts.get(enemyAircrafts.size - 1));\\n\\n // 所有飞行器发送子弹\\n shootAction()\\n }\\n\\n // 子弹飞动\\n bulletsMoveAction()\\n\\n // 飞行器移动\\n aircraftsMoveAction()\\n\\n // 道具移动\\n propsMoveAction()\\n\\n // 碰撞检测\\n crashCheckAction()\\n\\n // 后处理\\n postProcessAction()\\n\\n // 绘制帧\\n drawFrame()\\n\\n // Check if hero is alive\\n if (heroAircraft.hp <= 0) {\\n if (Setting.musicOpen) {\\n MusicManager.stopBgm()\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.GAME_OVER)\\n }\\n gameOverFlag = true\\n post { onGameOver?.invoke(score) }\\n }\\n\\n\\n // 帧率控制\\n val currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\\n val elapsed = currentTime - lastFrameTime\\n val sleepTime = FRAME_INTERVAL - elapsed\\n if (sleepTime > 0) {\\n try {\\n Thread.sleep(sleepTime)\\n } catch (e: InterruptedException) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n private fun timeCountAndNewCycleJudge(): Boolean {\\n cycleTime += timeInterval\\n if (cycleTime >= cycleDuration) {\\n cycleTime %= cycleDuration\\n return true\\n }\\n return false\\n }\\n\\n private fun shootAction() {\\n\\n // 敌机射击\\n for (enemy in enemyAircrafts) {\\n if (enemy is MobEnemy) continue // 普通敌机不射击\\n\\n val bullets = enemy.shoot()\\n enemyBullets.addAll(bullets!!.filterNotNull())\\n for (bullet in bullets!!) {\\n bombSubject.registerObserver(bullet)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 英雄射击\\n// MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.BULLET_SHOOT) // 太吵了，去掉\\n heroBullets.addAll(heroAircraft.shoot().filterNotNull())\\n\\n // 检查火力道具时间\\n heroAircraft.checkShootModeDuration()\\n }\\n\\n private fun bulletsMoveAction() {\\n for (bullet in heroBullets) {\\n bullet.forward()\\n }\\n for (bullet in enemyBullets) {\\n bullet.forward()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun aircraftsMoveAction() {\\n for (enemyAircraft in enemyAircrafts) {\\n enemyAircraft.forward()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun propsMoveAction() {\\n for (prop in props) {\\n prop.forward()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun generateProp(x: Int, y: Int) {\\n val randomNum: Int = randomFactory.nextInt(propRate).toInt()\\n if (randomNum in 0..<3) { // 30% 生成血量道具\\n props.add(propBloodFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n } else if (randomNum in 3..<6) { // 30% 生成炸弹道具\\n props.add(propBombFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n } else if (randomNum in 6..<9) { // 30% 生成子弹道具(两种)\\n val bulletType: Int = randomFactory.nextInt(2)\\n if (bulletType == 0) {\\n props.add(propBulletFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n } else if (bulletType == 1) {\\n props.add(propBulletPlusFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n }\\n } else { // 10% 不生成道具\\n return\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun crashCheckAction() {\\n\\n // 敌机子弹攻击英雄\\n for (bullet in enemyBullets) {\\n if (bullet.notValid()) continue\\n if (heroAircraft.crash(bullet)) {\\n heroAircraft.decreaseHp(bullet.power)\\n bullet.vanish()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 英雄子弹与敌机碰撞检测\\n for (bullet in heroBullets) {\\n if (bullet.notValid()) continue\\n for (enemyAircraft in enemyAircrafts) {\\n if (enemyAircraft.notValid()) continue\\n if (enemyAircraft.crash(bullet)) {\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.BULLET_HIT)\\n // Enemy hit by hero bullet\\n enemyAircraft.decreaseHp(bullet.power)\\n bullet.vanish()\\n if (enemyAircraft.notValid()) {\\n val propX: Int = enemyAircraft.getLocationXVal()\\n val propY: Int = enemyAircraft.getLocationYVal()\\n when (enemyAircraft) {\\n is MobEnemy -> {\\n // Normal enemy\\n }\\n\\n is EliteEnemy -> {\\n generateProp(propX, propY)\\n }\\n\\n is SuperEliteEnemy -> {\\n generateProp(propX, propY)\\n }\\n }\\n if (enemyAircraft is BossEnemy) { // 生成 <= 3个道具\\n generateProp(propX, propY)\\n generateProp((propX + 100) % AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH, propY + 20)\\n generateProp((propX + 200) % AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH, propY + 50)\\n bossExistFlag = 0 // Boss被击毁，标志复位\\n bossKillCount += 1\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 英雄飞机与敌机碰撞检测（独立于子弹循环）\\n for (enemyAircraft in enemyAircrafts) {\\n if (enemyAircraft.notValid()) continue\\n if (enemyAircraft.crash(heroAircraft) || heroAircraft.crash(enemyAircraft)) {\\n enemyAircraft.vanish()\\n heroAircraft.decreaseHp(heroAircraft.hp)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n for (prop in props) {\\n if (prop.notValid()) continue\\n if (heroAircraft.crash(prop)) {\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.GET_PROP)\\n prop.vanish()\\n when (prop) {\\n is PropBlood -> {\\n heroAircraft.increaseHp(30)\\n }\\n\\n is PropBullet -> {\\n heroAircraft.changeShootMode(\\\"SCATTER\\\")\\n }\\n\\n is PropBulletPlus -> {\\n heroAircraft.changeShootMode(\\\"WAVE\\\")\\n }\\n\\n is PropBomb -> {\\n if (Setting.musicOpen) {\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.BOMB_EXPLOSION)\\n }\\n prop.action()\\n bombSubject.notifyObservers()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun postProcessAction() {\\n // 移除无效敌机\\n val aircraftIter = enemyAircrafts.iterator()\\n while (aircraftIter.hasNext()) {\\n val aircraft = aircraftIter.next()\\n if (!aircraft.notValid()) continue // 注意：notValid() 返回 true 表示无效\\n\\n // 获得分数\\n when (aircraft) {\\n is MobEnemy -> score += 10\\n is EliteEnemy -> score += 20\\n is SuperEliteEnemy -> score += 30\\n is BossEnemy -> {\\n score += 50\\n MusicManager.switchNormalBgm()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n\\n bombSubject.removeObserver(aircraft) // 先取消注册\\n aircraftIter.remove() // 再从集合移除\\n }\\n\\n // 移除无效子弹\\n val bulletIter = enemyBullets.iterator()\\n while (bulletIter.hasNext()) {\\n val bullet = bulletIter.next()\\n if (!bullet.notValid()) continue\\n bombSubject.removeObserver(bullet)\\n bulletIter.remove()\\n }\\n\\n heroBullets.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n props.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n enemyBullets.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n enemyAircrafts.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n }\\n\\n // =====================\\n // Drawing methods\\n // =====================\\n\\n private fun drawFrame() {\\n var canvas: Canvas? = null\\n try {\\n canvas = holder.lockCanvas()\\n if (canvas != null) {\\n drawGame(canvas)\\n }\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n } finally {\\n if (canvas != null) {\\n try {\\n holder.unlockCanvasAndPost(canvas)\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun drawGame(canvas: Canvas) {\\n // Draw scrolling background\\n backgroundBitmapScaled?.let { bg ->\\n canvas.drawBitmap(bg, 0f, (backgroundTop - height).toFloat(), paint)\\n canvas.drawBitmap(bg, 0f, backgroundTop.toFloat(), paint)\\n backgroundTop += 1\\n if (backgroundTop >= height) {\\n backgroundTop = 0\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // Draw bullets first, then aircraft (bullets appear below aircraft)\\n drawObjects(canvas, enemyBullets)\\n drawObjects(canvas, heroBullets)\\n drawObjects(canvas, enemyAircrafts)\\n drawObjects(canvas, props)\\n\\n // Draw hero aircraft\\n val heroImg = ImageManager.heroImage\\n canvas.drawBitmap(\\n heroImg,\\n (heroAircraft.getLocationXVal() - heroImg.width / 2).toFloat(),\\n (heroAircraft.getLocationYVal() - heroImg.height / 2).toFloat(),\\n paint\\n )\\n\\n // Draw score and life\\n drawScoreAndLife(canvas)\\n }\\n\\n private fun drawObjects(canvas: Canvas, objects: List<AbstractFlyingObject>) {\\n for (obj in objects) {\\n val image = ImageManager.get(obj)?: continue\\n canvas.drawBitmap(\\n image,\\n (obj.getLocationXVal() - image.width / 2).toFloat(),\\n (obj.getLocationYVal() - image.height / 2).toFloat(),\\n paint\\n )\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun drawScoreAndLife(canvas: Canvas) {\\n val x = 20f\\n var y = 60f\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"SCORE: $score\\\", x, y, textPaint)\\n y += 50f\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"LIFE: ${heroAircraft.hp}\\\", x, y, textPaint)\\n }\\n\\n // =====================\\n // Touch control\\n // =====================\\n\\n override fun onTouchEvent(event: MotionEvent): Boolean {\\n when (event.action) {\\n MotionEvent.ACTION_MOVE, MotionEvent.ACTION_DOWN -> {\\n val x = event.x\\n val y = event.y\\n if (x < 0 || x > width || y < 0 || y > height) {\\n return true\\n }\\n if (::heroAircraft.isInitialized) {\\n heroAircraft.setLocation(x.toDouble(), y.toDouble())\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n return true\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 释放资源\\n */\\n fun release() {\\n overGame()\\n }\\n\\n}\\n... \"package edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.Views\\n\\nimport android.content.Context\\nimport android.graphics.Bitmap\\nimport android.graphics.Canvas\\nimport android.graphics.Color\\nimport android.graphics.Paint\\nimport android.graphics.Typeface\\nimport android.util.Log\\nimport android.view.MotionEvent\\nimport android.view.SurfaceHolder\\nimport android.view.SurfaceView\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.AircraftWarApplication\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.R\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.AbstractAircraft\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.BossEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.EliteEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.HeroAircraft\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.MobEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.SuperEliteEnemy\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.basic.AbstractFlyingObject\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.bullet.BaseBullet\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.BossEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.EliteEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.MobEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBloodFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBombFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBulletFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.PropBulletPlusFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.factory.SuperEliteEnemyFactory\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.observer.BombSubject\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.BaseProp\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBlood\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBomb\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBullet\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.prop.PropBulletPlus\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.utils.ImageManager\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Music.MusicManager\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Setting\\nimport com.example.feature_online.OnlineGameClient\\nimport java.util.Random\\n\\n\\n/**\\n * 联机游戏主视图\\n * 使用 SurfaceView 支持高性能游戏渲染\\n * 通过 OnlineGameClient 与服务端通信，实时同步双方分数\\n */\\nclass GameOnlineView(context: Context, private val client: OnlineGameClient) : SurfaceView(context), SurfaceHolder.Callback, Runnable {\\n\\n companion object {\\n private const val TAG = \\\"GameOnlineView\\\"\\n\\n // 目标帧率\\n private const val TARGET_FPS = 45 // 联机模式降低帧率60 -> 45，减少延迟\\n private const val FRAME_INTERVAL = 1000L / TARGET_FPS // ~22ms\\n }\\n\\n // 飞行物列表\\n private lateinit var heroAircraft: HeroAircraft\\n private var enemyAircrafts: MutableList<AbstractAircraft> = mutableListOf()\\n private var heroBullets: MutableList<BaseBullet> = mutableListOf()\\n private var enemyBullets: MutableList<BaseBullet> = mutableListOf()\\n private var props: MutableList<BaseProp> = mutableListOf()\\n\\n // 工厂\\n private val mobEnemyFactory = MobEnemyFactory()\\n private val eliteEnemyFactory = EliteEnemyFactory()\\n private val superEliteEnemyFactory = SuperEliteEnemyFactory()\\n private val bossEnemyFactory = BossEnemyFactory()\\n private val propBloodFactory = PropBloodFactory()\\n private val propBombFactory = PropBombFactory()\\n private val propBulletFactory = PropBulletFactory()\\n private val propBulletPlusFactory = PropBulletPlusFactory()\\n\\n\\n /**\\n * 屏幕中出现的敌机最大数量\\n */\\n private var enemyMaxNumber = 5\\n private var bossExistFlag = 0 // 是否已经生成Boss\\n private var bossKillCount = 0 // 已击毁Boss数量\\n private var randomFactory: Random = Random() // 生成随机数\\n\\n /**\\n * 敌机生成概率\\n * 70% 生成普通敌机\\n * 20% 生成精英敌机\\n * 10% 生成超级精英敌机\\n */\\n private val enemyRate = 10\\n\\n /**\\n * 道具生成概率\\n * 30% 生成血量道具\\n * 30% 生成炸弹道具\\n * 30% 生成子弹道具(两种)\\n * 10% 不生成道具\\n */\\n private val propRate = 10\\n\\n // 背景图片\\n private var backgroundBitmapScaled: Bitmap? = null\\n private var backgroundTop: Int = 0\\n\\n // 子弹发射间隔控制\\n private val cycleDuration = 1200\\n private var cycleTime = 0\\n private var timeInterval = 40\\n\\n // Game over标识\\n private var gameOverFlag = false // 本方英雄是否死亡\\n @Volatile\\n private var onlineAllOver = false // 对战是否全部结束（双方都死亡）\\n var onGameOver: ((Int) -> Unit)? = null // 游戏结束回调\\n\\n // 分数\\n private var score = 0 // 本方分数\\n @Volatile\\n private var opponentScore = 0 // 对手分数\\n private var lastSentScore = -1 // 上次发送的分数，避免重复发送\\n\\n // 观察者\\n private var bombSubject: BombSubject = BombSubject()\\n\\n // 画笔，用于绘制图像、文字\\n private val paint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG)\\n private val textPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {\\n color = Color.RED\\n textSize = 48f\\n typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD\\n }\\n\\n // SurfaceHolder，控制surface的创建和销毁\\n private val surfaceHolder: SurfaceHolder = holder\\n private var gameThread: Thread? = null\\n private var isRunning = false\\n\\n\\n init {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"GameOnlineView created\\\")\\n surfaceHolder.addCallback(this) // 设置SurfaceHolder回调，监听surface创建和销毁\\n isFocusable = true\\n isFocusableInTouchMode = true\\n\\n // 设置网络数据接收回调\\n client.onServerDataReceived = { oppScore, isAllOver ->\\n opponentScore = oppScore\\n if (isAllOver) {\\n onlineAllOver = true\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"对战结束！本方分数: $score, 对手分数: $oppScore\\\")\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun initGameObjects() {\\n heroAircraft = HeroAircraft(\\n width / 2,\\n height - ImageManager.heroImage.height,\\n 0, 0, 100\\n )\\n heroAircraft.setShootStrategy(\\\"NORMAL\\\")\\n }\\n\\n // ======================\\n // SurfaceHolder回调，监听surface创建和销毁\\n // ======================\\n\\n override fun surfaceCreated(holder: SurfaceHolder) {\\n assert(AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_HEIGHT == height)\\n assert(AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH == width)\\n\\n when (Setting.getDifficulty()) {\\n \\\"easy\\\" -> {\\n backgroundBitmapScaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(ImageManager.backgroundImageEasy, width, height, false)\\n }\\n \\\"medium\\\" -> {\\n backgroundBitmapScaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(ImageManager.backgroundImageNormal, width, height, false)\\n }\\n \\\"hard\\\" -> {\\n backgroundBitmapScaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(ImageManager.backgroundImageHard, width, height, false)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 初始化游戏对象\\n initGameObjects()\\n isRunning = true\\n startGame()\\n }\\n\\n override fun surfaceChanged(holder: SurfaceHolder, format: Int, width: Int, height: Int) {\\n // 屏幕尺寸变化时重新计算缩放（可选）\\n }\\n\\n override fun surfaceDestroyed(holder: SurfaceHolder) {\\n overGame()\\n }\\n\\n\\n // =======================\\n // 游戏action相关\\n // =======================\\n\\n fun startGame() {\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"Game started\\\")\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"当前难度：${Setting.getDifficulty()}\\\")\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"音效开关：${Setting.musicOpen}\\\")\\n MusicManager.switchNormalBgm()\\n gameThread = Thread(this, \\\"GameLoop\\\").apply { start() }\\n }\\n fun pauseGame() {\\n isRunning = false\\n }\\n fun overGame() {\\n isRunning = false\\n gameThread?.join()\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"Game paused\\\")\\n }\\n override fun run() {\\n while (isRunning) {\\n val lastFrameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\\n\\n // 本方未死亡时，执行正常游戏逻辑\\n if (!gameOverFlag) {\\n // 敌机生成、子弹发射频率控制\\n if (timeCountAndNewCycleJudge()) {\\n // Spawn new enemy aircraft\\n if (enemyAircrafts.size < enemyMaxNumber) {\\n val randomNum = randomFactory.nextInt(enemyRate).toInt()\\n\\n // 根据随机数生成普通、精英敌机、超级精英敌机\\n if (randomNum == 0){\\n enemyAircrafts.add(superEliteEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n }else if (randomNum == 1 || randomNum == 2){\\n enemyAircrafts.add(eliteEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n }\\n else{\\n enemyAircrafts.add(mobEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 每300分产生一个Boss, 且场上只能有一个Boss(仅普通模式、困难模式)\\n if (score >= (bossKillCount + 1) * 300 && score != 0 && bossExistFlag == 0\\n && Setting.getDifficulty() != \\\"easy\\\"){\\n MusicManager.switchBossBgm()\\n enemyAircrafts.add(bossEnemyFactory.createEnemy()!!);\\n bossExistFlag = 1;\\n }\\n\\n // 观察者注册新敌机\\n bombSubject.registerObserver(enemyAircrafts.get(enemyAircrafts.size - 1));\\n\\n // 所有飞行器发送子弹\\n shootAction()\\n }\\n\\n // 子弹飞动\\n bulletsMoveAction()\\n\\n // 飞行器移动\\n aircraftsMoveAction()\\n\\n // 道具移动\\n propsMoveAction()\\n\\n // 碰撞检测\\n crashCheckAction()\\n\\n // 后处理\\n postProcessAction()\\n\\n // 检查英雄是否存活\\n if (heroAircraft.hp <= 0) {\\n if (Setting.musicOpen) {\\n MusicManager.stopBgm()\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.GAME_OVER)\\n }\\n gameOverFlag = true\\n // 发送死亡通知\\n client.sendData(score, true)\\n lastSentScore = score\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"本方英雄阵亡，分数: $score\\\")\\n }\\n\\n // 发送本方分数到服务端（分数变化时才发送）\\n if (score != lastSentScore) {\\n client.sendData(score, false)\\n lastSentScore = score\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 无论是否死亡，都持续绘制帧（死亡后显示等待/结果画面）\\n drawFrame()\\n\\n // 如果对战全部结束（双方都死亡），退出游戏循环\\n if (onlineAllOver) {\\n drawFrame() // 多绘制一帧确保最终结果显示\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"对战结束，退出游戏循环\\\")\\n break\\n }\\n\\n // 帧率控制\\n val currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\\n val elapsed = currentTime - lastFrameTime\\n val sleepTime = FRAME_INTERVAL - elapsed\\n if (sleepTime > 0) {\\n try {\\n Thread.sleep(sleepTime)\\n } catch (e: InterruptedException) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n private fun timeCountAndNewCycleJudge(): Boolean {\\n cycleTime += timeInterval\\n if (cycleTime >= cycleDuration) {\\n cycleTime %= cycleDuration\\n return true\\n }\\n return false\\n }\\n\\n private fun shootAction() {\\n\\n // 敌机射击\\n for (enemy in enemyAircrafts) {\\n if (enemy is MobEnemy) continue // 普通敌机不射击\\n\\n val bullets = enemy.shoot()\\n enemyBullets.addAll(bullets!!.filterNotNull())\\n for (bullet in bullets!!) {\\n bombSubject.registerObserver(bullet)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 英雄射击\\n// MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.BULLET_SHOOT) // 太吵了，去掉\\n heroBullets.addAll(heroAircraft.shoot().filterNotNull())\\n\\n // 检查火力道具时间\\n heroAircraft.checkShootModeDuration()\\n }\\n\\n private fun bulletsMoveAction() {\\n for (bullet in heroBullets) {\\n bullet.forward()\\n }\\n for (bullet in enemyBullets) {\\n bullet.forward()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun aircraftsMoveAction() {\\n for (enemyAircraft in enemyAircrafts) {\\n enemyAircraft.forward()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun propsMoveAction() {\\n for (prop in props) {\\n prop.forward()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun generateProp(x: Int, y: Int) {\\n val randomNum: Int = randomFactory.nextInt(propRate).toInt()\\n if (randomNum in 0..<3) { // 30% 生成血量道具\\n props.add(propBloodFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n } else if (randomNum in 3..<6) { // 30% 生成炸弹道具\\n props.add(propBombFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n } else if (randomNum in 6..<9) { // 30% 生成子弹道具(两种)\\n val bulletType: Int = randomFactory.nextInt(2)\\n if (bulletType == 0) {\\n props.add(propBulletFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n } else if (bulletType == 1) {\\n props.add(propBulletPlusFactory.createProp(x, y)!!)\\n }\\n } else { // 10% 不生成道具\\n return\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun crashCheckAction() {\\n\\n // 敌机子弹攻击英雄\\n for (bullet in enemyBullets) {\\n if (bullet.notValid()) continue\\n if (heroAircraft.crash(bullet)) {\\n heroAircraft.decreaseHp(bullet.power)\\n bullet.vanish()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 英雄子弹与敌机碰撞检测\\n for (bullet in heroBullets) {\\n if (bullet.notValid()) continue\\n for (enemyAircraft in enemyAircrafts) {\\n if (enemyAircraft.notValid()) continue\\n if (enemyAircraft.crash(bullet)) {\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.BULLET_HIT)\\n // Enemy hit by hero bullet\\n enemyAircraft.decreaseHp(bullet.power)\\n bullet.vanish()\\n if (enemyAircraft.notValid()) {\\n val propX: Int = enemyAircraft.getLocationXVal()\\n val propY: Int = enemyAircraft.getLocationYVal()\\n when (enemyAircraft) {\\n is MobEnemy -> {\\n // Normal enemy\\n }\\n\\n is EliteEnemy -> {\\n generateProp(propX, propY)\\n }\\n\\n is SuperEliteEnemy -> {\\n generateProp(propX, propY)\\n }\\n }\\n if (enemyAircraft is BossEnemy) { // 生成 <= 3个道具\\n generateProp(propX, propY)\\n generateProp((propX + 100) % AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH, propY + 20)\\n generateProp((propX + 200) % AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH, propY + 50)\\n bossExistFlag = 0 // Boss被击毁，标志复位\\n bossKillCount += 1\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // 英雄飞机与敌机碰撞检测（独立于子弹循环）\\n for (enemyAircraft in enemyAircrafts) {\\n if (enemyAircraft.notValid()) continue\\n if (enemyAircraft.crash(heroAircraft) || heroAircraft.crash(enemyAircraft)) {\\n enemyAircraft.vanish()\\n heroAircraft.decreaseHp(heroAircraft.hp)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n for (prop in props) {\\n if (prop.notValid()) continue\\n if (heroAircraft.crash(prop)) {\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.GET_PROP)\\n prop.vanish()\\n when (prop) {\\n is PropBlood -> {\\n heroAircraft.increaseHp(30)\\n }\\n\\n is PropBullet -> {\\n heroAircraft.changeShootMode(\\\"SCATTER\\\")\\n }\\n\\n is PropBulletPlus -> {\\n heroAircraft.changeShootMode(\\\"WAVE\\\")\\n }\\n\\n is PropBomb -> {\\n if (Setting.musicOpen) {\\n MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.BOMB_EXPLOSION)\\n }\\n prop.action()\\n bombSubject.notifyObservers()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun postProcessAction() {\\n // 移除无效敌机\\n val aircraftIter = enemyAircrafts.iterator()\\n while (aircraftIter.hasNext()) {\\n val aircraft = aircraftIter.next()\\n if (!aircraft.notValid()) continue // 注意：notValid() 返回 true 表示无效\\n\\n // 获得分数\\n when (aircraft) {\\n is MobEnemy -> score += 10\\n is EliteEnemy -> score += 20\\n is SuperEliteEnemy -> score += 30\\n is BossEnemy -> {\\n score += 50\\n MusicManager.switchNormalBgm()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n\\n bombSubject.removeObserver(aircraft) // 先取消注册\\n aircraftIter.remove() // 再从集合移除\\n }\\n\\n // 移除无效子弹\\n val bulletIter = enemyBullets.iterator()\\n while (bulletIter.hasNext()) {\\n val bullet = bulletIter.next()\\n if (!bullet.notValid()) continue\\n bombSubject.removeObserver(bullet)\\n bulletIter.remove()\\n }\\n\\n heroBullets.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n props.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n enemyBullets.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n enemyAircrafts.removeAll { it.notValid() }\\n }\\n\\n // =====================\\n // Drawing methods\\n // =====================\\n\\n private fun drawFrame() {\\n var canvas: Canvas? = null\\n try {\\n canvas = holder.lockCanvas()\\n if (canvas != null) {\\n drawGame(canvas)\\n }\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n } finally {\\n if (canvas != null) {\\n try {\\n holder.unlockCanvasAndPost(canvas)\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun drawGame(canvas: Canvas) {\\n // Draw scrolling background\\n backgroundBitmapScaled?.let { bg ->\\n canvas.drawBitmap(bg, 0f, (backgroundTop - height).toFloat(), paint)\\n canvas.drawBitmap(bg, 0f, backgroundTop.toFloat(), paint)\\n backgroundTop += 1\\n if (backgroundTop >= height) {\\n backgroundTop = 0\\n }\\n }\\n\\n // Draw bullets first, then aircraft (bullets appear below aircraft)\\n drawObjects(canvas, enemyBullets)\\n drawObjects(canvas, heroBullets)\\n drawObjects(canvas, enemyAircrafts)\\n drawObjects(canvas, props)\\n\\n // Draw hero aircraft\\n val heroImg = ImageManager.heroImage\\n canvas.drawBitmap(\\n heroImg,\\n (heroAircraft.getLocationXVal() - heroImg.width / 2).toFloat(),\\n (heroAircraft.getLocationYVal() - heroImg.height / 2).toFloat(),\\n paint\\n )\\n\\n // Draw score and life\\n drawScoreAndLife(canvas)\\n }\\n\\n private fun drawObjects(canvas: Canvas, objects: List<AbstractFlyingObject>) {\\n for (obj in objects) {\\n val image = ImageManager.get(obj)?: continue\\n canvas.drawBitmap(\\n image,\\n (obj.getLocationXVal() - image.width / 2).toFloat(),\\n (obj.getLocationYVal() - image.height / 2).toFloat(),\\n paint\\n )\\n }\\n }\\n\\n private fun drawScoreAndLife(canvas: Canvas) {\\n val x = 20f\\n var y = 60f\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"我的分数: $score\\\", x, y, textPaint)\\n y += 50f\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"对手分数: $opponentScore\\\", x, y, textPaint)\\n y += 50f\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"LIFE: ${heroAircraft.hp}\\\", x, y, textPaint)\\n\\n // 本方已死亡但对战未结束，显示等待提示\\n if (gameOverFlag && !onlineAllOver) {\\n drawWaitingOverlay(canvas)\\n }\\n\\n // 对战全部结束，显示最终结果\\n if (onlineAllOver) {\\n drawFinalResult(canvas)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 本方已死亡，等待对手结束\\n */\\n private fun drawWaitingOverlay(canvas: Canvas) {\\n // 半透明遮罩\\n val overlayPaint = Paint().apply { color = Color.argb(150, 0, 0, 0) }\\n canvas.drawRect(0f, 0f, width.toFloat(), height.toFloat(), overlayPaint)\\n\\n val tipPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {\\n color = Color.WHITE\\n textSize = 64f\\n typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD\\n textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER\\n }\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"你已阵亡\\\", width / 2f, height / 2f - 60f, tipPaint)\\n tipPaint.textSize = 40f\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"等待对手结束...\\\", width / 2f, height / 2f + 20f, tipPaint)\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 双方都死亡，显示最终对战结果\\n */\\n private fun drawFinalResult(canvas: Canvas) {\\n // 半透明遮罩\\n val overlayPaint = Paint().apply { color = Color.argb(180, 0, 0, 0) }\\n canvas.drawRect(0f, 0f, width.toFloat(), height.toFloat(), overlayPaint)\\n\\n val titlePaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {\\n color = Color.YELLOW\\n textSize = 72f\\n typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD\\n textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER\\n }\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"对战结束\\\", width / 2f, height / 2f - 120f, titlePaint)\\n\\n val scorePaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {\\n color = Color.WHITE\\n textSize = 52f\\n typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD\\n textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER\\n }\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"我的分数: $score\\\", width / 2f, height / 2f - 30f, scorePaint)\\n canvas.drawText(\\\"对手分数: $opponentScore\\\", width / 2f, height / 2f + 40f, scorePaint)\\n\\n // 显示胜负结果\\n val resultText = when {\\n score > opponentScore -> \\\"你赢了！\\\"\\n score < opponentScore -> \\\"你输了！\\\"\\n else -> \\\"平局！\\\"\\n }\\n val resultPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {\\n color = when {\\n score > opponentScore -> Color.GREEN\\n score < opponentScore -> Color.RED\\n else -> Color.CYAN\\n }\\n textSize = 80f\\n typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD\\n textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER\\n }\\n canvas.drawText(resultText, width / 2f, height / 2f + 140f, resultPaint)\\n }\\n\\n // =====================\\n // Touch control\\n // =====================\\n\\n override fun onTouchEvent(event: MotionEvent): Boolean {\\n if (gameOverFlag) { // 游戏结束，不响应触摸事件\\n return true\\n }\\n when (event.action) {\\n MotionEvent.ACTION_MOVE, MotionEvent.ACTION_DOWN -> {\\n val x = event.x\\n val y = event.y\\n if (x < 0 || x > width || y < 0 || y > height) {\\n return true\\n }\\n if (::heroAircraft.isInitialized) {\\n heroAircraft.setLocation(x.toDouble(), y.toDouble())\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n return true\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 释放资源\\n */\\n fun release() {\\n overGame()\\n {"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1776395251,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","conversation_id":"019d8fed3e2a711ebf4dff4a281c6300","tool_call_id":"tooluse_qODYxZXp8CXY0OYcXnbXks","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","toolCallId":"tooluse_qODYxZXp8CXY0OYcXnbXks","content":"{\"content\": \"package edu.hitsz.aircraftwar\\n\\nimport android.content.Intent\\nimport android.os.Build\\nimport android.os.Bundle\\nimport android.util.Log\\nimport androidx.activity.enableEdgeToEdge\\nimport androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity\\nimport androidx.core.view.ViewCompat\\nimport androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat\\nimport android.view.Window\\nimport android.view.WindowManager\\nimport android.widget.FrameLayout\\nimport androidx.annotation.RequiresApi\\nimport androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.Views.GameView\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.Views.RankActivity\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.data.DataManager\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.data.SingleGameInfo\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.utils.ImageManager\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.utils.Utils\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Setting\\nimport com.example.feature_online.*\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.Views.BaseActivity\\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\\n\\n/**\\n * Android 程序入口 - 替代 Swing 的 Main 类\\n * @author hitsz\\n */\\nclass MainActivity : BaseActivity() {\\n\\n companion object {\\n // 保持与原项目一致的逻辑尺寸（用于游戏坐标计算）\\n const val TAG = \\\"MainActivity\\\"\\n }\\n\\n private lateinit var gameView: GameView\\n private var isGameOver = false\\n\\n @RequiresApi(Build.VERSION_CODES.O)\\n override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {\\n super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)\\n\\n window.addFlags(WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON)\\n setContentView(R.layout.activity_main)\\n\\n // 初始化图片管理器\\n ImageManager.init(AircraftWarApplication.context)\\n\\n // 初始化自定义游戏 View\\n gameView = GameView(AircraftWarApplication.context)\\n val container = findViewById<FrameLayout>(R.id.game_container)\\n container.addView(gameView)\\n\\n // 定义游戏结束回调\\n gameView.onGameOver = { score ->\\n Log.d(TAG, \\\"game over: $score\\\")\\n gameOver(score)\\n }\\n }\\n\\n @RequiresApi(Build.VERSION_CODES.O)\\n fun gameOver(score: Int) {\\n isGameOver = true\\n var dataInfo: SingleGameInfo = SingleGameInfo()\\n dataInfo.score = score\\n dataInfo.userName = Setting.userName\\n dataInfo.date = Utils.getCurrentFormatTime()\\n DataManager.saveData(dataInfo)\\n // 先停止游戏线程，避免 onPause 中 join 导致阻塞\\n gameView.overGame()\\n val intent = Intent(this, RankActivity::class.java)\\n startActivity(intent)\\n }\\n\\n override fun onResume() {\\n super.onResume()\\n // 恢复游戏循环（对应原 game.action()）\\n if (!isGameOver) {\\n gameView.startGame()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onPause() {\\n super.onPause()\\n // 暂停游戏，避免后台耗电\\n if (!isGameOver) {\\n gameView.overGame()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n override fun onDestroy() {\\n super.onDestroy()\\n // 彻底释放资源\\n gameView.release()\\n }\\n}\\n... {"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1776395253,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","conversation_id":"019d8fed3e2a711ebf4dff4a281c6300","tool_call_id":"tooluse_eUkBLs6E49yvm8pQDfQrFO","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","toolCallId":"tooluse_eUkBLs6E49yvm8pQDfQrFO","content":"{\"content\": \"package edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.basic\\n\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.AircraftWarApplication\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.aircraft.AbstractAircraft\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.logic.utils.ImageManager\\n\\n\\nabstract class AbstractFlyingObject {\\n\\n //locationX、locationY为图片中心位置坐标\\n /**\\n * x 轴坐标\\n */\\n protected var locationX: Int = 0\\n\\n /**\\n * y 轴坐标\\n */\\n protected var locationY: Int = 0\\n\\n\\n /**\\n * x 轴移动速度\\n */\\n protected var speedX: Int = 0\\n\\n /**\\n * y 轴移动速度\\n */\\n protected var speedY: Int = 0\\n\\n /**\\n * x 轴长度，根据图片尺寸获得\\n * -1 表示未设置\\n */\\n protected var width: Int = -1\\n\\n /**\\n * y 轴长度，根据图片尺寸获得\\n * -1 表示未设置\\n */\\n protected var height: Int = -1\\n\\n\\n /**\\n * 有效（生存）标记，\\n * 通常标记为 false的对象会在下次刷新时清除\\n */\\n protected var isValid: Boolean = true\\n\\n constructor(locationX: Int, locationY: Int, speedX: Int, speedY: Int) {\\n this.locationX = locationX\\n this.locationY = locationY\\n this.speedX = speedX\\n this.speedY = speedY\\n }\\n\\n fun getLocationXVal(): Int = locationX\\n\\n fun getLocationYVal(): Int = locationY\\n\\n /**\\n * 可飞行对象根据速度移动\\n * 若飞行对象触碰到横向边界，横向速度反向\\n */\\n open fun forward() {\\n locationX += speedX\\n locationY += speedY\\n if (locationX <= 0 || locationX >= AircraftWarApplication.SCREEN_WIDTH) {\\n // 横向超出边界后反向\\n speedX = -speedX\\n }\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 碰撞检测，当对方坐标进入我方范围，判定我方击中

\\n * 对方与我方覆盖区域有交叉即判定撞击。\\n *

\\n * 非飞机对象区域：\\n * 横向，[x - width/2, x + width/2]\\n * 纵向，[y - height/2, y + height/2]\\n *

\\n * 飞机对象区域：\\n * 横向，[x - width/2, x + width/2]\\n * 纵向，[y - height/4, y + height/4]\\n *\\n * @param flyingObject 撞击对方\\n * @return true: 我方被击中; false 我方未被击中\\n */\\n fun crash(flyingObject: AbstractFlyingObject): Boolean {\\n // 缩放因子，用于控制 y轴方向区域范围\\n val factor = if (this is AbstractAircraft) 2 else 1 //我方\\n val fFactor = if (flyingObject is AbstractAircraft) 2 else 1 //对方\\n\\n //对方坐标、宽度、高度\\n val x = flyingObject.locationX\\n val y = flyingObject.locationY\\n val fWidth = flyingObject.width\\n val fHeight = flyingObject.height\\n\\n if (fWidth == -1 || fHeight == -1) {\\n this.width = getWidthVal()\\n this.height = getHeightVal()\\n }\\n\\n return x + (fWidth + this.width) / 2 > locationX && x - (fWidth + this.width) / 2 < locationX && y + (fHeight / fFactor + this.height / factor) / 2 > locationY && y - (fHeight / fFactor + this.height / factor) / 2 < locationY\\n }\\n\\n fun setLocation(locationX: Double, locationY: Double) {\\n this.locationX = locationX.toInt()\\n this.locationY = locationY.toInt()\\n }\\n\\n fun getWidthVal(): Int {\\n if (width == -1) {\\n val image = ImageManager.get(this)\\n if (image != null) {\\n width = image.width\\n }\\n }\\n return width\\n }\\n\\n fun getHeightVal(): Int {\\n if (height == -1) {\\n val image = ImageManager.get(this)\\n if (image != null) {\\n height = image.height\\n }\\n }\\n return height\\n }\\n\\n fun notValid(): Boolean {\\n return !this.isValid\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 标记消失，\\n * isValid = false.\\n * notValid() => true.\\n */\\n fun vanish() {\\n isValid = false\\n }\\n\\n // 用于观察者模式\\n open fun update() {\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"3.52 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 150}"}

EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"1.23 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 49}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1776395263,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","conversation_id":"019d8fed3e2a711ebf4dff4a281c6300","tool_call_id":"tooluse_Rz28uEbZu3qYmZBdtmOc3v","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","toolCallId":"tooluse_Rz28uEbZu3qYmZBdtmOc3v","content":"{\"content\": \"package edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Music\\n\\nimport android.media.AudioAttributes\\nimport android.media.MediaPlayer\\nimport android.media.SoundPool\\nimport android.os.Build\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.AircraftWarApplication\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.R\\nimport edu.hitsz.aircraftwar.setting.Setting\\n\\nobject MusicManager {\\n\\n // ---------- BGM 相关 ----------\\n private var bgmMediaPlayer: MediaPlayer? = null // 当前正在播放的 BGM\\n\\n // ---------- 音效相关 ----------\\n private lateinit var soundPool: SoundPool\\n private val soundMap = mutableMapOf<SoundType, Int>() // 存储加载后的音效 ID\\n\\n enum class SoundType {\\n BULLET_SHOOT, // 子弹发射\\n BULLET_HIT, // 子弹击中\\n BOMB_EXPLOSION, // 炸弹爆炸\\n GET_PROP, // 获取道具\\n GAME_OVER, // 游戏结束\\n }\\n\\n init {\\n // 初始化 SoundPool（兼容 API 21+ 和旧版本）\\n val audioAttributes = AudioAttributes.Builder()\\n .setUsage(AudioAttributes.USAGE_GAME)\\n .setContentType(AudioAttributes.CONTENT_TYPE_SONIFICATION)\\n .build()\\n\\n soundPool = SoundPool.Builder()\\n .setMaxStreams(10) // 最多同时播放 10 个音效\\n .setAudioAttributes(audioAttributes)\\n .build()\\n\\n // 预加载音效资源\\n soundMap[SoundType.BOMB_EXPLOSION] = soundPool.load(AircraftWarApplication.context, R.raw.bomb_explosion, 1)\\n soundMap[SoundType.BULLET_SHOOT] = soundPool.load(AircraftWarApplication.context, R.raw.bullet, 1)\\n soundMap[SoundType.BULLET_HIT] = soundPool.load(AircraftWarApplication.context, R.raw.bullet_hit, 1)\\n soundMap[SoundType.GET_PROP] = soundPool.load(AircraftWarApplication.context, R.raw.get_supply, 1)\\n soundMap[SoundType.GAME_OVER] = soundPool.load(AircraftWarApplication.context, R.raw.game_over, 1)\\n }\\n\\n fun switchNormalBgm() {\\n if (!Setting.musicOpen) return\\n playBgm(R.raw.bgm, loop = true)\\n }\\n\\n fun switchBossBgm() {\\n if (!Setting.musicOpen) return\\n playBgm(R.raw.bgm_boss, loop = true)\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 播放指定的 BGM\\n */\\n private fun playBgm(resId: Int, loop: Boolean) {\\n // 停止并释放当前 BGM\\n stopBgm()\\n\\n try {\\n bgmMediaPlayer = MediaPlayer.create(AircraftWarApplication.context, resId).apply {\\n isLooping = loop\\n setOnCompletionListener {\\n // 播放完成时的回调（若 loop = false 时可能用到）\\n if (!loop) {\\n releaseBgmPlayer()\\n }\\n }\\n start()\\n }\\n } catch (e: Exception) {\\n e.printStackTrace()\\n }\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 停止当前 BGM 并释放 MediaPlayer\\n */\\n fun stopBgm() {\\n bgmMediaPlayer?.let {\\n if (it.isPlaying) {\\n it.stop()\\n }\\n it.release()\\n }\\n bgmMediaPlayer = null\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 暂停当前 BGM（不释放资源，可恢复）\\n */\\n fun pauseBgm() {\\n bgmMediaPlayer?.let {\\n if (it.isPlaying) {\\n it.pause()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 恢复暂停的 BGM\\n */\\n fun resumeBgm() {\\n bgmMediaPlayer?.let {\\n if (!it.isPlaying) {\\n it.start()\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 播放单个音效\\n * @param type 音效类型\\n * @param leftVolume 左声道音量 (0.0 ~ 1.0)，默认 1.0\\n * @param rightVolume 右声道音量 (0.0 ~ 1.0)，默认 1.0\\n * @param priority 优先级（仅旧版 SoundPool 有效，现无实际作用），默认 0\\n * @param loop 是否循环，0 不循环，-1 无限循环，默认 0\\n * @param rate 播放速率 (0.5 ~ 2.0)，默认 1.0\\n */\\n fun playSound(\\n type: SoundType,\\n leftVolume: Float = 1.0f,\\n rightVolume: Float = 1.0f,\\n priority: Int = 0,\\n loop: Int = 0,\\n rate: Float = 1.0f\\n ) {\\n if (!Setting.musicOpen) return\\n val soundId = soundMap[type]\\n if (soundId == null) {\\n println(\\\"音效 $type 未加载，请先调用 setSoundResource() 设置资源 ID\\\")\\n return\\n }\\n soundPool.play(soundId, leftVolume, rightVolume, priority, loop, rate)\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 释放所有音频资源（在游戏退出或不需要音频时调用）\\n */\\n fun release() {\\n stopBgm()\\n soundPool.release()\\n // 注意：release 后 SoundPool 不能再使用，如需重新使用需重新初始化 MusicManager\\n }\\n\\n /**\\n * 释放内部的 BGM 播放器（辅助方法）\\n */\\n private fun releaseBgmPlayer() {\\n bgmMediaPlayer?.release()\\n bgmMediaPlayer = null\\n }\\n}\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"4.28 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 158}"}

parent.paddingRight - 16\\n for (i in 0 until parent.childCount - 1) {\\n val child = parent.getChildAt(i)\\n val top = child.bottom.toFloat()\\n c.drawLine(left.toFloat(), top, right.toFloat(), top, paint)\\n }\\n }\\n })\\n\\n val scores = DataManager.loadData(difficulty)\\n val adapter = ScoreAdapter(scores)\\n scoresRecyclerView.adapter = adapter\\n }\\n}\\n... {"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","conversation_id":"019d8fed3e2a711ebf4dff4a281c6300","tool_call_id":"tooluse_aP7bVEbsFwRkXvO9a6qT1Z","document":{"file_path":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/AircraftWar/refactor.md","sub_content":"refactor.md","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/AircraftWar/refactor.md","sub_content_tip":"/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/AircraftWar/refactor.md","apply_content":" # AircraftWar Android 客户端 MVC 重构架构文档 --- ## 一、现有架构全面分析 ### 1.1 项目概述 AircraftWar 是一款基于 Android 平台的单机飞机大战游戏，使用 Kotlin 语言开发，支持单机模式（简单/中等/困难）和联机对战模式。游戏采用 `SurfaceView` 进行高性能渲染，通过触屏控制英雄飞机移动。 ### 1.2 当前目录结构 ``` edu.hitsz.aircraftwar/ ├── AircraftWarApplication.kt # Application 全局上下文 ├── ActivityCollector.kt # Activity 生命周期管理 ├── MainActivity.kt # 单机游戏 Activity ├── Views/ │ ├── BaseActivity.kt # Activity 基类 │ ├── MenuActivity.kt # 主菜单界面 │ ├── OnlineActivity.kt # 联机模式入口 │ ├── RankActivity.kt # 排行榜界面 │ ├── GameView.kt # 单机游戏主视图（核心，578行） │ ├── GameOnlineView.kt # 联机游戏主视图（核心，690行） │ ├── ScoreItemData.kt # 排行榜 RecyclerView 适配器 │ └── fragments/ │ ├── CreateRoomFragment.kt # 创建房间 Fragment │ └── JoinRoomFragment.kt # 加入房间 Fragment ├── data/ │ ├── DataManager.kt # 数据持久化管理（文件读写） │ └── SingleGameInfo.kt # 单局游戏数据模型 ├── logic/ │ ├── basic/ │ │ └── AbstractFlyingObject.kt # 飞行物基类 │ ├── aircraft/ │ │ ├── AbstractAircraft.kt # 飞机抽象类 │ │ ├── HeroAircraft.kt # 英雄飞机 │ │ ├── MobEnemy.kt # 普通敌机 │ │ ├── EliteEnemy.kt # 精英敌机 │ │ ├── SuperEliteEnemy.kt # 超级精英敌机 │ │ └── BossEnemy.kt # Boss 敌机 │ ├── bullet/ │ │ ├── BaseBullet.kt # 子弹基类 │ │ ├── HeroBullet.kt # 英雄子弹 │ │ └── EnemyBullet.kt # 敌机子弹 │ ├── prop/ │ │ ├── BaseProp.kt # 道具基类 │ │ ├── PropBlood.kt # 血量道具 │ │ ├── PropBomb.kt # 炸弹道具 │ │ ├── PropBullet.kt # 子弹道具 │ │ └── PropBulletPlus.kt # 高级子弹道具 │ ├── factory/ │ │ ├── EnemyFactory.kt # 敌机工厂接口 │ │ ├── MobEnemyFactory.kt # 普通敌机工厂 │ │ ├── EliteEnemyFactory.kt # 精英敌机工厂 │ │ ├── SuperEliteEnemyFactory.kt # 超级精英敌机工厂 │ │ ├── BossEnemyFactory.kt # Boss 工厂 │ │ ├── PropFactory.kt # 道具工厂接口 │ │ ├── PropBloodFactory.kt # 血量道具工厂 │ │ ├── PropBombFactory.kt # 炸弹道具工厂 │ │ ├── PropBulletFactory.kt # 子弹道具工厂 │ │ └── PropBulletPlusFactory.kt # 高级子弹道具工厂 │ ├── strategy/ │ │ ├── ShootStrategy.kt # 射击策略接口 │ │ ├── NormalShoot.kt # 普通射击 │ │ ├── ScatterShoot.kt # 散射 │ │ ├── WaveShoot.kt # 波浪射击 │ │ └── NoneShoot.kt # 不射击 │ ├── observer/ │ │ ├── Subject.kt # 观察者接口 │ │ └── BombSubject.kt # 炸弹观察者主题 │ ├── difficulty/ │ │ ├── Difficulty.kt # 难度抽象类 │ │ ├── Easy.kt # 简单难度 │ │ ├── Medium.kt # 中等难度 │ │ └── Hard.kt # 困难难度 │ └── utils/ │ ├── ImageManager.kt # 图片资源管理 │ └── Utils.kt # 工具类 ├── setting/ │ ├── Setting.kt # 全局设置（单例） │ └── Music/ │ └── MusicManager.kt # 音乐/音效管理 └── feature-Online/ # 联机模块（独立 module） ├── OnlineData.kt # 联机数据模型 ├── OnlineGameClient.kt # 联机客户端 └── OnlineGameServer.kt # 联机服务端 ``` ### 1.3 当前架构组成 当前项目**没有明确的架构模式**，呈现出一种"以 View 为中心"的混合结构： | 层次 | 组件 | 职责 | |------|------|------| | **视图层** | `GameView` / `GameOnlineView` | 游戏渲染 + 游戏逻辑 + 状态管理 + 输入处理 | | **Activity 层** | `MainActivity` / `MenuActivity` / `RankActivity` | 界面容器 + 部分业务逻辑 | | **数据层** | `DataManager` / `SingleGameInfo` | 数据持久化 | | **逻辑实体层** | `logic/` 包下所有类 | 游戏对象定义 + 设计模式实现 | | **设置层** | `Setting` / `MusicManager` | 全局配置 + 音频管理 | ### 1.4 当前数据流 ```mermaid flowchart TD A[MenuActivity] -->|选择难度/模式| B[Setting 全局单例] A -->|启动游戏| C[MainActivity] C -->|创建| D[GameView] D -->|触屏事件| D D -->|游戏循环 run| D D -->|敌机生成| E[EnemyFactory] D -->|道具生成| F[PropFactory] D -->|碰撞检测| D D -->|分数计算| D D -->|绘制帧| D D -->|游戏结束回调| C C -->|保存数据| G[DataManager] C -->|跳转| H[RankActivity] H -->|读取数据| G ``` ### 1.5 当前设计模式使用情况 | 设计模式 | 实现位置 | 说明 | |----------|----------|------| | **工厂模式** | `logic/factory/` | `EnemyFactory` / `PropFactory` 接口 + 具体工厂类 | | **策略模式** | `logic/strategy/` | `ShootStrategy` 接口 + 多种射击策略 | | **观察者模式** | `logic/observer/` | `Subject` 接口 + `BombSubject` 实现炸弹全屏效果 | | **单例模式** | `Setting` / `MusicManager` / `DataManager` / `ImageManager` | Kotlin `object` 关键字实现 | --- ## 二、当前架构问题与不足 ### 2.1 核心问题：GameView 严重违反单一职责原则（God Object） `GameView.kt`（578行）和 `GameOnlineView.kt`（690行）是整个项目最严重的问题。这两个类承担了**至少 6 种不同的职责**： | 职责 | 代码体现 | |------|----------| | **游戏状态管理** | `score`、`gameOverFlag`、`bossExistFlag`、`bossKillCount` 等状态变量 | | **游戏对象管理** | `heroAircraft`、`enemyAircrafts`、`heroBullets`、`enemyBullets`、`props` 列表管理 | | **游戏逻辑处理** | `shootAction()`、`crashCheckAction()`、`postProcessAction()`、`generateProp()` | | **敌机生成调度** | `run()` 中的敌机生成逻辑、Boss 生成条件判断 | | **渲染绘制** | `drawFrame()`、`drawGame()`、`drawObjects()`、`drawScoreAndLife()` | | **输入处理** | `onTouchEvent()` 处理触屏控制 | | **生命周期管理** | `surfaceCreated()`、`surfaceDestroyed()`、`startGame()`、`overGame()` | **影响**： - 修改任何一个功能都需要在这个巨大的类中定位和修改 - 无法对游戏逻辑进行单元测试（与 Android View 强耦合） - 新增功能（如新敌机类型、新道具效果）需要修改核心类 ### 2.2 GameView 与 GameOnlineView 大量代码重复 两个文件之间存在**约 80% 的代码重复**，包括： - 完全相同的游戏对象声明和工厂实例化 - 完全相同的 `shootAction()`、`bulletsMoveAction()`、`aircraftsMoveAction()`、`propsMoveAction()` - 完全相同的 `crashCheckAction()`、`postProcessAction()` - 完全相同的 `generateProp()` - 几乎相同的 `drawGame()`、`drawObjects()` - 几乎相同的 `surfaceCreated()` 初始化逻辑 **影响**： - 修复一个 bug 需要在两个文件中同步修改 - 新增功能需要在两处重复实现 - 极易出现不一致性 ### 2.3 View 层直接操作业务逻辑 `GameView` 中直接包含了： - 敌机生成概率计算（`enemyRate`、`propRate`） - Boss 生成条件判断（`score >= (bossKillCount + 1) * 300`） - 碰撞检测算法 - 分数计算逻辑 - 道具效果处理 这些**纯业务逻辑**不应该存在于 View 层，导致： - 无法脱离 Android 环境测试游戏逻辑 - View 层过于臃肿 - 逻辑与展示强耦合 ### 2.4 Difficulty 系统未真正生效 `Difficulty` 抽象类定义了 `eliteProbability`、`enemyCycle`、`enemyAbility` 等属性，`Medium` 和 `Hard` 类重写了 `improve_difficulty()` 方法，但在 `GameView` 中： - 敌机生成概率是**硬编码**的（`enemyRate = 10`，固定 70%/20%/10%） - 难度仅影响背景图片和 Boss 是否生成 - `Difficulty` 类的属性从未被 `GameView` 读取和使用 ### 2.5 Setting 全局单例滥用 `Setting` 作为全局单例，被 `GameView`、`MenuActivity`、`MusicManager`、`DataManager` 等多处直接访问： - 形成隐式依赖，难以追踪数据流 - 无法在测试中替换或 mock - `onlineMode` 状态管理不清晰（设置后未重置） ### 2.6 MainActivity 中存在业务逻辑 `MainActivity.gameOver()` 方法中包含了： - 构建 `SingleGameInfo` 数据对象 - 调用 `DataManager.saveData()` 保存数据 - 控制游戏线程停止 这些逻辑应该由专门的 Controller 或 ViewModel 处理。 ### 2.7 PropBomb 观察者模式实现冗余 `PropBomb` 类内部自行实现了一套观察者模式（`registerObserver`、`removeObserver`、`notifyObservers`），同时 `GameView` 中又使用了 `BombSubject` 来管理观察者。两套机制并存，`PropBomb.action()` 调用自身的 `notifyObservers()`，而 `GameView` 中又调用 `bombSubject.notifyObservers()`，存在逻辑混乱。 ### 2.8 线程安全问题 `GameView` 中的游戏对象列表（`enemyAircrafts`、`heroBullets` 等）在游戏线程中修改，在 UI 线程的 `onTouchEvent` 中读取 `heroAircraft`，没有同步机制。`GameOnlineView` 中 `opponentScore` 使用了 `@Volatile`，但其他共享状态未做保护。 ### 2.9 ImageManager 与游戏对象耦合 `AbstractFlyingObject.getWidthVal()` / `getHeightVal()` 直接调用 `ImageManager.get(this)` 获取图片尺寸，导致： - 游戏逻辑对象依赖渲染资源 - 无法在无图片环境下进行逻辑测试 --- ## 三、MVC 重构方案设计 ### 3.1 MVC 架构总体设计 ```mermaid graph TB subgraph View["View 层（展示与输入）"] V1[GameSurfaceView
纯渲染 + 触屏输入] V2[MenuActivity
菜单界面] V3[RankActivity
排行榜界面] V4[GameActivity
游戏容器] end subgraph Controller["Controller 层（协调与控制）"] C1[GameController
游戏主循环控制器] C2[CollisionController
碰撞检测控制器] C3[SpawnController
敌机/道具生成控制器] C4[ScoreController
分数与游戏结束控制器] end subgraph Model["Model 层（数据与业务逻辑）"] M1[GameState
游戏状态数据] M2[EntityManager
游戏实体管理] M3[GameConfig
游戏配置/难度参数] M4[ScoreRepository
分数数据仓库] end V1 -->|触屏坐标| C1 C1 -->|更新英雄位置| M2 C1 -->|驱动游戏循环| C2 C1 -->|驱动游戏循环| C3 C1 -->|驱动游戏循环| C4 C2 -->|碰撞结果| M1 C3 -->|生成实体| M2 C4 -->|分数变化| M1 M1 -->|状态变化通知| V1 M2 -->|实体列表| V1 M4 -->|历史分数| V3 ``` ### 3.2 各层职责划分 #### 3.2.1 Model 层 Model 层负责**游戏数据的存储和业务规则**，不依赖任何 Android 框架类。 | 类名 | 职责 | 说明 | |------|------|------| | `GameState` | 游戏运行状态 | 分数、游戏是否结束、Boss 状态、当前周期等 | | `EntityManager` | 游戏实体集合管理 | 管理所有飞行物列表（英雄、敌机、子弹、道具），提供增删查接口 | | `GameConfig` | 游戏配置参数 | 根据难度提供敌机生成概率、最大敌机数、Boss 生成阈值等参数 | | `ScoreRepository` | 分数数据仓库 | 封装 `DataManager` 的读写操作，提供统一的数据访问接口 | | `SingleGameInfo` | 单局数据模型 | 保持不变 | | 现有 `logic/` 包 | 游戏实体定义 | `AbstractFlyingObject`、各类飞机、子弹、道具、工厂、策略、观察者等保持不变 | #### 3.2.2 View 层 View 层**只负责渲染和用户输入采集**，不包含任何游戏逻辑。 | 类名 | 职责 | 说明 | |------|------|------| | `GameSurfaceView` | 游戏画面渲染 | 仅负责将 Controller 提供的实体列表绘制到 Canvas 上，以及采集触屏事件转发给 Controller | | `GameActivity` | 游戏 Activity 容器 | 替代现有 `MainActivity`，负责创建 View 和 Controller，管理生命周期 | | `MenuActivity` | 主菜单 | 保持不变，负责难度选择和模式切换 | | `RankActivity` | 排行榜 | 保持不变，从 `ScoreRepository` 获取数据 | | `ScoreAdapter` | 排行榜适配器 | 保持不变 | #### 3.2.3 Controller 层 Controller 层**协调 Model 和 View**，包含游戏主循环和各子系统的控制逻辑。 | 类名 | 职责 | 说明 | |------|------|------| | `GameController` | 游戏主循环控制器 | 驱动游戏循环（`run()`），协调各子控制器，管理游戏线程 | | `SpawnController` | 生成控制器 | 根据 `GameConfig` 的参数控制敌机和道具的生成逻辑 | | `CollisionController` | 碰撞控制器 | 处理所有碰撞检测逻辑，更新实体状态和游戏状态 | | `ScoreController` | 分数控制器 | 管理分数计算、游戏结束判定、数据保存 | | `InputController` | 输入控制器 | 处理触屏输入，更新英雄飞机位置 | | `OnlineGameController` | 联机游戏控制器 | 继承/组合 `GameController`，增加网络同步逻辑 | ### 3.3 重构后的目录结构 ``` edu.hitsz.aircraftwar/ ├── AircraftWarApplication.kt ├── ActivityCollector.kt │ ├── model/ # ← Model 层 │ ├── state/ │ │ └── GameState.kt # 游戏运行状态 │ ├── entity/ │ │ └── EntityManager.kt # 游戏实体集合管理 │ ├── config/ │ │ └── GameConfig.kt # 游戏配置（整合 Difficulty） │ ├── repository/ │ │ └── ScoreRepository.kt # 分数数据仓库 │ └── data/ │ ├── DataManager.kt # 底层数据持久化（保留） │ └── SingleGameInfo.kt # 数据模型（保留） │ ├── view/ # ← View 层 │ ├── activity/ │ │ ├── BaseActivity.kt │ │ ├── GameActivity.kt # 替代 MainActivity │ │ ├── MenuActivity.kt │ │ ├── RankActivity.kt │ │ └── OnlineActivity.kt │ ├── game/ │ │ ├── GameSurfaceView.kt # 纯渲染视图 │ │ └── GameRenderer.kt # 渲染辅助类（绘制逻辑） │ ├── adapter/ │ │ └── ScoreAdapter.kt │ └── fragments/ │ ├── CreateRoomFragment.kt │ └── JoinRoomFragment.kt │ ├── controller/ # ← Controller 层 │ ├── GameController.kt # 游戏主循环控制器 │ ├── SpawnController.kt # 敌机/道具生成控制器 │ ├── CollisionController.kt # 碰撞检测控制器 │ ├── ScoreController.kt # 分数管理控制器 │ ├── InputController.kt # 输入处理控制器 │ └── OnlineGameController.kt # 联机游戏控制器 │ ├── logic/ # 游戏实体与设计模式（保留） │ ├── basic/ │ │ └── AbstractFlyingObject.kt │ ├── aircraft/ │ ├── bullet/ │ ├── prop/ │ ├── factory/ │ ├── strategy/ │ ├── observer/ │ ├── difficulty/ │ └── utils/ │ ├── ImageManager.kt │ └── Utils.kt │ └── setting/ ├── Setting.kt └── Music/ └── MusicManager.kt ``` ### 3.4 重构后的数据流 ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant V as GameSurfaceView participant GC as GameController participant SC as SpawnController participant CC as CollisionController participant ScC as ScoreController participant EM as EntityManager participant GS as GameState Note over GC: 游戏主循环 (每帧) V->>GC: onTouch(x, y) GC->>EM: updateHeroPosition(x, y) GC->>SC: trySpawnEnemies() SC->>GS: 读取分数/Boss状态 SC->>EM: addEnemy(enemy) GC->>EM: moveAllEntities() GC->>CC: checkCollisions() CC->>EM: 获取所有实体 CC->>EM: 移除/标记无效实体 CC->>GS: 更新分数/HP GC->>ScC: checkGameOver() ScC->>GS: 读取英雄HP ScC-->>GC: 游戏结束信号 GC->>V: requestRender(entityManager, gameState) V->>V: drawFrame() ``` --- ## 四、核心类详细设计 ### 4.1 GameState（游戏状态） ```kotlin // model/state/GameState.kt class GameState { var score: Int = 0 var gameOverFlag: Boolean = false var bossExistFlag: Boolean = false var bossKillCount: Int = 0 var cycleTime: Int = 0 // 联机模式扩展 var opponentScore: Int = 0 var onlineAllOver: Boolean = false fun reset() { score = 0 gameOverFlag = false bossExistFlag = false bossKillCount = 0 cycleTime = 0 } } ``` ### 4.2 EntityManager（实体管理器） ```kotlin // model/entity/EntityManager.kt class EntityManager { lateinit var heroAircraft: HeroAircraft val enemyAircrafts: MutableList = mutableListOf() val heroBullets: MutableList = mutableListOf() val enemyBullets: MutableList = mutableListOf() val props: MutableList = mutableListOf() val bombSubject: BombSubject = BombSubject() fun initHero(x: Int, y: Int) { heroAircraft = HeroAircraft(x, y, 0, 0, 100) heroAircraft.setShootStrategy("NORMAL") } fun moveAllEntities() { enemyAircrafts.forEach { it.forward() } heroBullets.forEach { it.forward() } enemyBullets.forEach { it.forward() } props.forEach { it.forward() } } fun removeInvalidEntities(): List { // 返回本帧被移除的敌机列表（用于计分） val removed = enemyAircrafts.filter { it.notValid() } removed.forEach { bombSubject.removeObserver(it) } val removedBullets = enemyBullets.filter { it.notValid() } removedBullets.forEach { bombSubject.removeObserver(it) } enemyAircrafts.removeAll { it.notValid() } heroBullets.removeAll { it.notValid() } enemyBullets.removeAll { it.notValid() } props.removeAll { it.notValid() } return removed } } ``` ### 4.3 GameConfig（游戏配置） ```kotlin // model/config/GameConfig.kt class GameConfig(difficulty: Difficulty) { val enemyMaxNumber: Int val enemyRate: Int = 10 val propRate: Int = 10 val bossScoreThreshold: Int = 300 val cycleDuration: Int = 1200 val timeInterval: Int = 40 val targetFps: Int // 真正使用 Difficulty 的参数 val eliteProbability: Double val enemyAbility: Double init { when (difficulty) { is Easy -> { enemyMaxNumber = 4 targetFps = 60 eliteProbability = difficulty.eliteProbability enemyAbility = difficulty.enemyAbility } is Medium -> { enemyMaxNumber = 5 targetFps = 60 eliteProbability = difficulty.eliteProbability enemyAbility = difficulty.enemyAbility } is Hard -> { enemyMaxNumber = 6 targetFps = 60 eliteProbability = difficulty.eliteProbability enemyAbility = difficulty.enemyAbility } else -> { enemyMaxNumber = 5 targetFps = 60 eliteProbability = 0.2 enemyAbility = 1.0 } } } } ``` ### 4.4 GameController（游戏主控制器） ```kotlin // controller/GameController.kt class GameController( private val gameConfig: GameConfig, private val entityManager: EntityManager, private val gameState: GameState, private val onGameOver: (Int) -> Unit ) : Runnable { private val spawnController = SpawnController(gameConfig, entityManager, gameState) private val collisionController = CollisionController(entityManager, gameState) private val scoreController = ScoreController(gameState) private var gameThread: Thread? = null private var isRunning = false // View 层回调接口 var onFrameReady: (() -> Unit)? = null fun start() { isRunning = true gameThread = Thread(this, "GameLoop").apply { start() } MusicManager.switchNormalBgm() } fun stop() { isRunning = false gameThread?.join() } fun handleTouchInput(x: Float, y: Float) { entityManager.heroAircraft.setLocation(x.toDouble(), y.toDouble()) } override fun run() { val frameInterval = 1000L / gameConfig.targetFps while (isRunning && !gameState.gameOverFlag) { val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis() // 1. 生成敌机 if (timeCountAndNewCycleJudge()) { spawnController.spawnEnemies() spawnController.shootAll() } // 2. 移动所有实体 entityManager.moveAllEntities() // 3. 碰撞检测 collisionController.checkAllCollisions() // 4. 后处理（移除无效实体 + 计分） scoreController.processRemovedEntities(entityManager.removeInvalidEntities()) // 5. 通知 View 绘制 onFrameReady?.invoke() // 6. 检查游戏结束 if (entityManager.heroAircraft.hp <= 0) { gameState.gameOverFlag = true MusicManager.stopBgm() MusicManager.playSound(MusicManager.SoundType.GAME_OVER) onGameOver(gameState.score) } // 帧率控制 val elapsed = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime val sleepTime = frameInterval - elapsed if (sleepTime > 0) Thread.sleep(sleepTime) } } private fun timeCountAndNewCycleJudge(): Boolean { gameState.cycleTime += gameConfig.timeInterval if (gameState.cycleTime >= gameConfig.cycleDuration) { gameState.cycleTime %= gameConfig.cycleDuration return true } return false } } ``` ### 4.5 GameSurfaceView（纯渲染视图） ```kotlin // view/game/GameSurfaceView.kt class GameSurfaceView( context: Context, private val entityManager: EntityManager, private val gameState: GameState ) : SurfaceView(context), SurfaceHolder.Callback { private val paint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG) private val textPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { color = Color.RED textSize = 48f typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD } private var backgroundBitmap: Bitmap? = null private var backgroundTop: Int = 0 // 触屏事件回调 var onTouchInput: ((Float, Float) -> Unit)? = null // Surface 就绪回调 var onSurfaceReady: ((Int, Int) -> Unit)? = null init { holder.addCallback(this) isFocusable = true isFocusableInTouchMode = true } override fun surfaceCreated(holder: SurfaceHolder) { initBackground() onSurfaceReady?.invoke(width, height) } override fun surfaceChanged(holder: SurfaceHolder, f: Int, w: Int, h: Int) {} override fun surfaceDestroyed(holder: SurfaceHolder) {} fun render() { var canvas: Canvas? = null try { canvas = holder.lockCanvas() if (canvas != null) drawGame(canvas) } finally { canvas?.let { holder.unlockCanvasAndPost(it) } } } override fun onTouchEvent(event: MotionEvent): Boolean { when (event.action) { MotionEvent.ACTION_MOVE, MotionEvent.ACTION_DOWN -> { onTouchInput?.invoke(event.x, event.y) } } return true } // 纯绘制方法，不包含任何逻辑 private fun drawGame(canvas: Canvas) { /* 绘制背景、实体、UI */ } private fun drawObjects(canvas: Canvas, objects: List) { /* ... */ } private fun drawScoreAndLife(canvas: Canvas) { /* ... */ } } ``` --- ## 五、重构后模块交互关系 ```mermaid graph LR subgraph "View 层" GA[GameActivity] GSV[GameSurfaceView] end subgraph "Controller 层" GC[GameController] SpC[SpawnController] CC[CollisionController] ScC[ScoreController] end subgraph "Model 层" GS[GameState] EM[EntityManager] GCfg[GameConfig] SR[ScoreRepository] end subgraph "Logic 层（保留）" AF[Aircraft 体系] BL[Bullet 体系] PR[Prop 体系] FC[Factory 体系] ST[Strategy 体系] OB[Observer 体系] end GA -->|创建| GSV GA -->|创建| GC GSV -->|触屏事件| GC GC -->|协调| SpC GC -->|协调| CC GC -->|协调| ScC GC -->|通知渲染| GSV SpC -->|读写| EM SpC -->|读取| GCfg SpC -->|使用| FC CC -->|读写| EM CC -->|更新| GS ScC -->|读写| GS ScC -->|保存| SR EM -->|管理| AF EM -->|管理| BL EM -->|管理| PR GSV -->|读取| EM GSV -->|读取| GS ``` --- ## 六、重构实施步骤 ### 阶段一：提取 Model 层（低风险） | 步骤 | 操作 | 影响范围 | |------|------|----------| | 1.1 | 创建 `model/state/GameState.kt`，将 `GameView` 中的状态变量（`score`、`gameOverFlag`、`bossExistFlag`、`bossKillCount`、`cycleTime`）提取到此类 | `GameView`、`GameOnlineView` | | 1.2 | 创建 `model/entity/EntityManager.kt`，将实体列表管理（`heroAircraft`、`enemyAircrafts`、`heroBullets`、`enemyBullets`、`props`、`bombSubject`）和移动/清理方法提取到此类 | `GameView`、`GameOnlineView` | | 1.3 | 创建 `model/config/GameConfig.kt`，整合 `Difficulty` 参数，替代 `GameView` 中的硬编码配置 | `GameView`、`GameOnlineView`、`Difficulty` | | 1.4 | 创建 `model/repository/ScoreRepository.kt`，封装 `DataManager` 的调用 | `MainActivity`、`RankActivity` | ### 阶段二：提取 Controller 层（中风险） | 步骤 | 操作 | 影响范围 | |------|------|----------| | 2.1 | 创建 `controller/SpawnController.kt`，将敌机生成逻辑（`run()` 中的生成部分 + `generateProp()`）提取 | `GameView` | | 2.2 | 创建 `controller/CollisionController.kt`，将 `crashCheckAction()` 完整提取 | `GameView` | | 2.3 | 创建 `controller/ScoreController.kt`，将 `postProcessAction()` 中的计分逻辑提取 | `GameView` | | 2.4 | 创建 `controller/GameController.kt`，将游戏主循环（`run()`）、帧率控制、周期判断提取，组合调用各子控制器 | `GameView` | | 2.5 | 创建 `controller/OnlineGameController.kt`，继承 `GameController`，增加网络同步逻辑 | `GameOnlineView` | ### 阶段三：重构 View 层（中风险） | 步骤 | 操作 | 影响范围 | |------|------|----------| | 3.1 | 将 `GameView` 重构为 `GameSurfaceView`，仅保留渲染和触屏输入功能 | `GameView` | | 3.2 | 将 `MainActivity` 重构为 `GameActivity`，负责创建 Model、Controller、View 并连接 | `MainActivity` | | 3.3 | 统一 `GameView` 和 `GameOnlineView` 的渲染逻辑到 `GameSurfaceView`，联机特有的 UI（等待遮罩、结果显示）通过状态判断绘制 | `GameOnlineView` | ### 阶段四：修复遗留问题（低风险） | 步骤 | 操作 | 影响范围 | |------|------|----------| | 4.1 | 让 `GameConfig` 真正使用 `Difficulty` 的参数控制敌机生成概率和能力 | `SpawnController`、`GameConfig` | | 4.2 | 清理 `PropBomb` 中冗余的观察者实现，统一使用 `BombSubject` | `PropBomb`、`CollisionController` | | 4.3 | 解耦 `AbstractFlyingObject` 对 `ImageManager` 的依赖，改为在初始化时注入宽高 | `AbstractFlyingObject`、`Factory` 类 | | 4.4 | 为 `EntityManager` 的列表操作添加同步机制（`synchronized` 或 `CopyOnWriteArrayList`） | `EntityManager` | --- ## 七、重构前后对比 ### 7.1 代码行数对比（预估） | 文件 | 重构前 | 重构后 | |------|--------|--------| | `GameView.kt` | 578 行 | **删除**（拆分为以下文件） | | `GameOnlineView.kt` | 690 行 | **删除**（拆分为以下文件） | | `GameSurfaceView.kt` | - | ~150 行 | | `GameController.kt` | - | ~120 行 | | `OnlineGameController.kt` | - | ~80 行 | | `SpawnController.kt` | - | ~80 行 | | `CollisionController.kt` | - | ~100 行 | | `ScoreController.kt` | - | ~50 行 | | `GameState.kt` | - | ~30 行 | | `EntityManager.kt` | - | ~80 行 | | `GameConfig.kt` | - | ~50 行 | | **总计** | **1268 行（2个文件）** | **~740 行（10个文件）** | ### 7.2 职责对比 | 职责 | 重构前（所在类） | 重构后（所在类） | |------|------------------|------------------| | 游戏状态存储 | `GameView` | `GameState` (Model) | | 实体列表管理 | `GameView` | `EntityManager` (Model) | | 游戏配置 | `GameView` 硬编码 | `GameConfig` (Model) | | 敌机生成 | `GameView.run()` | `SpawnController` (Controller) | | 碰撞检测 | `GameView.crashCheckAction()` | `CollisionController` (Controller) | | 分数计算 | `GameView.postProcessAction()` | `ScoreController` (Controller) | | 游戏主循环 | `GameView.run()` | `GameController` (Controller) | | 画面渲染 | `GameView.drawXxx()` | `GameSurfaceView` (View) | | 触屏输入 | `GameView.onTouchEvent()` | `GameSurfaceView` (View) | | 数据保存 | `MainActivity.gameOver()` | `ScoreRepository` (Model) | ### 7.3 可测试性对比 | 测试类型 | 重构前 | 重构后 | |----------|--------|--------| | 碰撞检测单元测试 | ❌ 无法测试（嵌入 SurfaceView） | ✅ `CollisionController` 可独立测试 | | 敌机生成逻辑测试 | ❌ 无法测试 | ✅ `SpawnController` 可独立测试 | | 分数计算测试 | ❌ 无法测试 | ✅ `ScoreController` 可独立测试 | | 游戏状态测试 | ❌ 无法测试 | ✅ `GameState` 纯数据类可测试 | | 难度配置测试 | ❌ 无法测试 | ✅ `GameConfig` 可独立测试 | --- ## 八、风险评估与注意事项 ### 8.1 风险点 | 风险 | 等级 | 应对措施 | |------|------|----------| | 游戏循环线程与渲染线程同步 | 高 | `GameController` 通过回调通知 `GameSurfaceView` 渲染，使用 `synchronized` 保护共享数据 | | 联机模式网络回调线程安全 | 高 | `OnlineGameController` 中使用 `@Volatile` 和 `synchronized` 保护网络数据 | | 重构过程中功能回归 | 中 | 分阶段实施，每阶段完成后进行完整功能测试 | | 性能影响 | 低 | 新增的方法调用开销可忽略，实体管理集中化反而可能提升性能 | ### 8.2 注意事项 1. **保持 `logic/` 包不变**：现有的工厂模式、策略模式、观察者模式设计良好，无需修改 2. **渐进式重构**：建议按阶段一→二→三→四的顺序逐步实施，每步确保游戏可正常运行 3. **`feature-Online` 模块保持独立**：联机通信模块（`OnlineGameClient`/`OnlineGameServer`）作为独立 module 保持不变 4. **`Setting` 和 `MusicManager` 暂时保留**：这两个全局单例虽然不够理想，但重构优先级较低，可在后续迭代中改为依赖注入 --- ## 九、总结 当前项目的核心问题在于 `GameView` 承担了过多职责（God Object），且单机/联机两个 View 存在大量代码重复。通过 MVC 架构重构： - **Model 层**：将游戏状态、实体管理、配置参数从 View 中剥离，形成独立的、可测试的数据层 - **View 层**：`GameSurfaceView` 仅负责渲染和输入采集，代码量从 578/690 行降至约 150 行 - **Controller 层**：将游戏逻辑拆分为多个专职控制器，每个控制器职责单一、可独立测试 重构后，单机和联机模式共享同一套 Model 和 View，仅通过不同的 Controller（`GameController` vs `OnlineGameController`）实现差异化逻辑，彻底消除代码重复。 ","instruction":"创建完整的MVC重构架构文档refactor.md，包含现有架构分析、问题识别、MVC重构方案设计和实施计划。","apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1776395313,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1776395481,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","conversation_id":"019d8fed3e2a711ebf4dff4a281c6300","tool_call_id":"tooluse_aP7bVEbsFwRkXvO9a6qT1Z","result":{"commit_id":["5aef92cccb08b861a4dede0ebde26a39a90dde87","2d88bd1e8da28dd39f4eedc4a4595319e7afd944"]},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","toolCallId":"tooluse_aP7bVEbsFwRkXvO9a6qT1Z","content":""}

{"messageId":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d996836af70eb99babfe5bf1d532a","conversation_id":"019d8fed3e2a711ebf4dff4a281c6300","content":"重构架构文档已创建完成。下面是文档的核心内容概要：

---

## 已生成 [refactor.md](/Users/junjiecui/AndroidStudioProjects/AircraftWar/refactor.md)

文档包含以下九个章节：

### 一、现有架构全面分析
- 梳理了完整的项目目录结构和模块组成
- 绘制了当前数据流图（Mermaid 流程图）
- 总结了已使用的设计模式（工厂、策略、观察者、单例）

### 二、当前架构问题与不足（共 9 个问题）
- **核心问题**：`GameView`（578行）承担了 6 种职责，严重违反单一职责原则（God Object）
- **核心问题**：`GameView` 与 `GameOnlineView` 约 80% 代码重复
- View 层直接操作业务逻辑，无法单元测试
- `Difficulty` 系统参数未真正生效（敌机概率硬编码）
- `Setting` 全局单例滥用，形成隐式依赖
- `MainActivity` 中混入业务逻辑
- `PropBomb` 观察者模式实现冗余
- 线程安全问题
- `ImageManager` 与游戏对象耦合

### 三、MVC 重构方案设计
- **Model 层**：`GameState`（游戏状态）、`EntityManager`（实体管理）、`GameConfig`（配置参数）、`ScoreRepository`（数据仓库）
- **View 层**：`GameSurfaceView`（纯渲染 + 输入采集）、`GameActivity`（容器）
- **Controller 层**：`GameController`（主循环）、`SpawnController`（生成）、`CollisionController`（碰撞）、`ScoreController`（计分）、`OnlineGameController`（联机扩展）

### 四、核心类详细设计
- 提供了 `GameState`、`EntityManager`、`GameConfig`、`GameController`、`GameSurfaceView` 的完整代码示例

### 五、重构后模块交互关系
- 使用 Mermaid 图展示了 View → Controller → Model 的完整交互链路

### 六、重构实施步骤（4 个阶段）
1. **阶段一**：提取 Model 层（低风险）
2. **阶段二**：提取 Controller 层（中风险）
3. **阶段三**：重构 View 层（中风险）
4. **阶段四**：修复遗留问题（低风险）

### 七、重构前后对比
- 代码量：2 个文件 1268 行 → 10 个文件约 740 行
- 可测试性：从 0 个可测试模块 → 5 个可独立单元测试的模块

### 八、风险评估与注意事项

### 九、总结"},"timestamp":1776395486,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
# 需求文档
请分析当前Android客户端单机游戏的架构，识别其中存在的不足与问题。基于分析结果，使用MVC（Model-View-Controller）架构模式对整个项目进行重构，并输出一份详细的重构架构文档refactor.md。
具体要求如下： 1. 对现有架构进行全面分析，明确当前架构的组成、数据流和模块职责划分 2. 指出当前架构中存在的主要问题和不足，包括但不限于代码结构、模块耦合度、可维护性等方面 3. 基于MVC架构模式设计重构方案，明确Model、View、Controller各层的职责划分 4. 详细说明重构后的数据流向和模块交互关系 5. 提供具体的重构实施步骤和代码结构调整建议 6. 在refactor.md文档中完整记录架构分析、问题识别、重构方案设计和实施计划

option.name: question
option.value:
请根据提供的需求文档，完成以下任务：
8. 仔细阅读并理解需求文档的全部内容 7. 分析文档中的核心需求和具体要求 6. 明确任务的目标和预期交付成果 5. 制定执行计划或解决方案 4. 按要求完成相关任务内容
请确保： - 准确把握需求文档的关键信息 - 遵循文档中的规范和要求 - 如有疑问，优先基于文档内容进行分析 - 按时保质完成交付
